title: Gate pass workflow
description:
Groups the `gate pass` workflow improvements (REQ-04..REQ-06).

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `gate pass` uses the 0/4/10 exit-code taxonomy with a `verdict` field (REQ-04).
- [ ] `gate pass` skips already-passed gates at HEAD, with a `--force` override (REQ-05).
- [ ] `gate pass-all` runs required gates fail-fast (REQ-06).

## Notes

Containment for tasks T4 → T5 → T6.
